inputs.name: task
inputs.description: Compile a typed QCompute spec into an executable run plan.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.description: Optional environment readiness report used to gate compilation.

outputs.name: plan
outputs.description: Emit a compiled OpenQASM-backed run plan for execution.

provides.name: qcompute.compile.case
provides.description: Compile experiment specifications into controlled QCompute run plans.

provides.name: qcompute.circuit.compile
provides.description: Lower circuit sources into executable OpenQASM with compilation metadata.
